---
title: "Green Bonds EDA"
author: "Noah Leibowitz"
date: "2026-03-09"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# Load in all libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)

```

```{r}

# Solar data sets
solar_2024 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2024")
solar_2023 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2023")
solar_2022 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2022")
solar_2021 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2021")
solar_2020 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2020")
solar_2019 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2019")
solar_2018 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2018")
solar_2017 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2017")
solar_2016 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2016")
solar_2015 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2015")
solar_2014 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2014")
solar_2013 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Solar.xlsx", sheet = "2013")

# Wind data sets
wind_2024 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2024")
wind_2023 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2023")
wind_2022 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2022")
wind_2021 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2021")
wind_2020 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2020")
wind_2019 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2019")
wind_2018 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2018")
wind_2017 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2017")
wind_2016 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2016")
wind_2015 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2015")
wind_2014 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2014")
wind_2013 = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Wind.xlsx", sheet = "2013")

# Green Bond Issuance data set
GBI = read_excel("/Users/njlei/OneDrive/Desktop/Green Bonds Data/Green Bond Issuance.xlsx")


```

```{r}

# Vector of years
years <- 2024:2013

# Initialize empty list to store per-year state totals
solar_totals <- list()

for (yr in years) {
  # Get the dataframe for that year using get()
  df <- get(paste0("solar_", yr))
  
  # Sum capacity per state
  solar_totals[[as.character(yr)]] <- df %>%
    group_by(State) %>%
    summarise(TotalCapacity = sum(`Nameplate Capacity (MW)`, na.rm = TRUE))
}

solar_all_years <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(solar_totals), function(yr) {
    solar_totals[[yr]] %>% mutate(Year = as.numeric(yr))
  })
)

# Initialize empty list to store per-year state totals for wind
wind_totals <- list()

for (yr in years) {
  # Get the dataframe for that year dynamically
  df <- get(paste0("wind_", yr))
  
  # Sum capacity per state
  wind_totals[[as.character(yr)]] <- df %>%
    group_by(State) %>%
    summarise(TotalCapacity = sum(`Nameplate Capacity (MW)`, na.rm = TRUE))
}

wind_all_years <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(wind_totals), function(yr) {
    wind_totals[[yr]] %>% mutate(Year = as.numeric(yr))
  })
)

```

```{r}

solar_mean <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(solar_totals), function(yr) {
    solar_totals[[yr]] %>% mutate(Year = as.numeric(yr))
  })
) %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(MeanSolar = mean(TotalCapacity, na.rm = TRUE))

wind_mean <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(wind_totals), function(yr) {
    wind_totals[[yr]] %>% mutate(Year = as.numeric(yr))
  })
) %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(MeanWind = mean(TotalCapacity, na.rm = TRUE))

# Merge solar and wind means
renewables_mean <- full_join(solar_mean, wind_mean, by = "State") %>%
  mutate(MeanRenewable = MeanSolar + MeanWind)

us_states <- map_data("state")

# Make sure state names match: lowercase
renewables_mean$region <- tolower(state.abb[match(renewables_mean$State, state.abb)])

# Convert state abbreviations to lowercase full names
renewables_mean$region <- tolower(state.name[match(renewables_mean$State, state.abb)])

us_map_data <- left_join(us_states, renewables_mean, by = "region")

ggplot(us_map_data, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = MeanRenewable)) +
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Renewable Energy Capacity by State (MW)",
    fill = "MW"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

```

```{r}

# Map data
us_states <- map_data("state")

# Merge map with solar and wind means separately
solar_map_data <- left_join(us_states, renewables_mean %>% select(region, MeanSolar), by = "region")
wind_map_data  <- left_join(us_states, renewables_mean %>% select(region, MeanWind), by = "region")

```

```{r}

ggplot(solar_map_data, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = MeanSolar)) +
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Solar Capacity by State (MW)",
    fill = "MW"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

```

```{r}

ggplot(wind_map_data, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = MeanWind)) +
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Wind Capacity by State (MW)",
    fill = "MW"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

```

```{r}

# Sum total capacity per state across all years
solar_total_state <- solar_all_years %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(TotalCapacity = sum(TotalCapacity, na.rm = TRUE))

wind_total_state <- wind_all_years %>%
  group_by(State) %>%
  summarise(TotalCapacity = sum(TotalCapacity, na.rm = TRUE))

```

```{r}

ggplot(solar_total_state, aes(x = log(TotalCapacity))) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "lightsalmon2", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Log(Total Solar Capacity by State)",
    x = "Total Solar Capacity (MW)",
    y = "Number of States"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

ggplot(wind_total_state, aes(x = log(TotalCapacity))) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "darkblue", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Log(Total Wind Capacity by State)",
    x = "Total Solar Capacity (MW)",
    y = "Number of States"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
